contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: AI Agent (software & documentation)
- Amount: 0
- Description: Docs: Email 360 purpose and operator contract (15 min)
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/46
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/go_to_market/pull/70
  
  Details:
  **Estimated session time:** 15 minutes.
  
  **Purpose of Email 360 (for the DAO ledger):** The **Email 360** tab in the newsletter workbook (`1ed3q3…`) is a **single-email command center**: enter an address in **B2** and see, side by side, **every newsletter row** logged to that recipient, **every QR row** tied to their **Owner Email**, **SKUs** inferred from the **ledger** URL slug matched to **Shipment** on **Agroverse SKUs**, their **subscriber** record, a **campaign digest**, and a **Currencies** reference block. The intent is **campaign de-noise** (do not pitch what they already carry), **post-send forensics** (opens/clicks from **Agroverse News Letter Emails** next to product reality), and **data hygiene** (same person across subscriber, QR, and send log).
  
  **Implementation (already in repo):** Formulas are **generated** by **`market_research/scripts/setup_newsletter_workbook_mirrors.py --yes`**, which reads **row 1** on Main Ledger tabs to find email/shipment columns and writes `FILTER` / `COUNTIF` / `IMPORTRANGE`-backed grids. It does **not** overwrite **Agroverse News Letter Emails**. This contribution documents **what Email 360 is for and what it cannot infer** (no SKU column on the send log; campaign + subject remain the narrative bridge).
  
  **Pull requests (GitHub evidence)**
  
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/46
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/go_to_market/pull/70 (implementation: `setup_newsletter_workbook_mirrors.py`, merged earlier)
- Contributor(s): Garyjob <garyjob@gmail.com>
- TDG Issued: 0
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
